sessions.newDraftDescription: A new draft has been prepared. The session will be created when you analyze the prompt.
sessions.newStartedDescription: A new work session has been started for this brand kit.
sessions.deleteDescription: You will remove this session from the image module. The saved history for this session will no longer be available.
sessions.clearDescription: All image session history for this brand kit will be removed. This action cannot be undone.
sessions.clearedDescription: Image session history has been cleared.
sessions.persistImageError: Could not persist the session image
sessions.newIdeaTitle: This prompt looks like a new idea
sessions.newIdeaDescription: You can open a new session to keep this work separate, or stay in the current session and update its main idea.

unsaved.title: You have unsaved changes
unsaved.description: If you continue to {{action}}, you will lose the current changes in this session. What do you want to do?
unsaved.navigateTitle: There are unsaved changes. Do you want to save them?
unsaved.navigateDescription: If you continue without saving, you will lose the changes in this session.

errors.missingAiConfigDescription: There is no intelligence model configured in the Admin panel.
errors.analyzePromptDescription: The intent could not be parsed. Fill the fields manually.
errors.magicAnalyzeDescription: Something went wrong during the smart analysis.
errors.analyzingReferenceDescription: Wait for the analysis to finish before generating.
errors.retryDescription: Could not generate another image with the same settings.
errors.debugPromptDescription: Generate or edit an image first to view the sent prompt.
errors.missingIntentDescription: Analyze the prompt first to detect the intent.
errors.selectLayoutDescription: In advanced mode you must manually choose a layout.
errors.noLayoutsDescription: No layouts were found for the detected intent.
errors.noPreviousPromptDescription: Generate or refine an image first before retrying.

analysis.intentDetectedDescription: We detected that you want to create: {{intent}}

ui.editPlaceholder: Describe the changes to edit the image...
ui.setupPlaceholder: Set up your image in the top panel...
ui.retrySameSettings: Generate another with the same settings
ui.workPanelDescription: Swipe to open or close it without losing the preview.
ui.selectBrandKitDescription: To start designing in the Image panel, you need to select a Brand Kit. If you do not have one yet, create it in the "Brand Kit" section.
ui.sessionDialogDescription: The first time you save this session you can give it a clear name to find it later.
ui.ideaDescription: Write your idea and press the button to create the post
ui.designDescription: Choose a layout from the detected intent or manually force another intent.
ui.formatDescription: Select the dimensions for the social network.
ui.imageDescription: Upload a reference or use one from the Brand Kit.
ui.brandDescription: Choose the logo variant and adjust the color palette.
ui.whatToCreate: What do you want to create?
ui.ideaPlaceholder: Ex: In my sector the word 'lead' is used a lot but clients do not know what it means. I want a post that works like a dictionary explaining it clearly.
ui.basicModeDescription: Basic mode active: the layout is selected automatically based on what you write. Turn on advanced mode if you want more control.
ui.selectPlatformDescription: Select the platform and a format to continue.
ui.styleTypographyTitle: Apply the style to fonts too
ui.styleTypographyDescription: If enabled, the title and paragraph inherit the visual language of the style more strongly. The paragraph will remain clear and legible.
ui.styleTypographyAria: Apply the style to fonts too
ui.colorsReloadedDescription: Brand Kit colors were imported again.
ui.layoutVotesImportedDescription: Previous layout votes and marks were imported.
ui.layoutRatingsResetDescription: {{count}} layouts with 4 uses were reset to 0.
ui.voteAlreadyRecordedCurrentDescription: This generation already has a vote for this layout.
ui.voteAlreadyRecordedDescription: This generation already had a registered vote.
ui.voteSaveErrorDescription: The vote could not be recorded.
ui.linkDescription: Enable the link if you want to show a URL in the post.

toasts.analyzingReferenceDescription: Wait for the analysis to finish before generating.
